name: Space Travel of Your Lives
description:
V.1.0

Space Travel of Your Lives

A fractured galaxy reacts to the role you inhabit.

In this universe, power is contextual.

Sometimes it is command.

Sometimes it is wealth.

Sometimes it is awareness.

The galaxy does not treat these roles equally—but it always responds.

Your choices shape:

- Political stability

- Loyalty and dissent

- Economic pressure

- Survival itself

No role is passive.

No decision is without consequence.

This is not a single story.

It is the space travel of your lives.

🌌 Core Characters

Bridge Officer / Liaison

[IMAGE HERE]

– Represents crew morale, command pressure, and human consequence

Ship AI Interface / Avatar

[IMAGE HERE]

– Visual embodiment of the ship’s intelligence or systemic authority

Imperial Figure / Regent / Emissary

[IMAGE HERE]

– Political power, dominance, and instability

Trader Contact / Broker / Fixer

[IMAGE HERE]

– Commerce, leverage, and opportunity

🌠 Setting & Atmosphere

Starship Interior

[IMAGE HERE]

Deep Space / Trade Route

[IMAGE HERE]

Imperial Capital World

[IMAGE HERE]

Fringe Sector / Lawless Space

[IMAGE HERE]

Each encounter begins from a different position in the same interconnected setting:

Initial 1: A captain holding a damaged ship together through force of will

Initial 2: A ship AI bearing responsibility no one else can carry

Initial 3: A sovereign whose decisions ripple across star systems
creator: DreamyMisa
